MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: Please read each of the following statements. Decide how true or untrue each statement is for you, selecting a number from 1 to 7 where 1 is 'not at all true' and 7 is 'very true'.

wolf_im_em_1.Description: I prefer activities that challenge my knowledge or abilities.

wolf_im_em_2.Description: I often do things mainly because I think they can help me.

wolf_im_em_3.Description: I like to go on to new work that's at a more difficult level.

wolf_im_em_4.Description: I tend to do things that make me feel good about myself.

wolf_im_em_5.Description: I prefer games of skill to games of chance.

wolf_im_em_6.Description: I tend to like activities where I know what the rules are.

wolf_im_em_7.Description: I especially like doing hard things that I am good at.

wolf_im_em_8.Description: I never feel tired or sleepy.

wolf_im_em_9.Description: I don't like to be wrong.

wolf_im_em_10.Description: I like finding out new ways to do things and learn new skills.

wolf_im_em_11.Description: I perform better when I get detailed instructions about what to do.

wolf_im_em_12.Description: I like difficult work because I find it more interesting.

wolf_im_em_13.Description: If I have to put in effort, I want to get something in return.

wolf_im_em_14.Description: I really enjoy learning for its own sake.

im_average.Description: Average of all IM items. n/a if any individual IM items are n/a.

em_average.Description: Average of all EM items. n/a if any individual EM items are n/a.

validity_never_sleepy.Description: Validity check based off of if participant answered an extreme (1 or 7) to question 8 (invalid) about if they never feel tired or sleepy.

avg_of_im_em_averages.LongName: Average of IM and EM Average Scores
avg_of_im_em_averages.Description: Global score comprised of the average of the IM and EM average scores. n/a if IM or EM averages are n/a.

difference_of_im_em_averages.LongName: Difference of IM Average Score and EM Average Score (IM - EM)
difference_of_im_em_averages.Description: Global score comprised of the difference between the IM and EM average scores. n/a if IM or EM averages are n/a.
